# Stop — Do Not Open a Security Issue Publicly

If you have found a snippet in this library that is itself insecure, **do not open a public issue**. A public disclosure gives malicious actors time to exploit every developer who has copied that snippet into production before a fix is issued.

## Report Privately Instead

**Email:** lethabokhedama@gmail.com  
**Subject:** `[SECURITY] web-security-snippets — <brief description>`

Include:
- The exact file path
- A description of the vulnerability
- The impact for developers using this snippet
- A corrected version if possible

We aim to acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and issue a fix within 7 days.

**Close this issue and send an email instead.**
